rulings.Case Title: ALMA VILLANUEVA et al VS. ROBERT DURWARD et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 14, 2011, line 6. DEFENDANT ROBERT DURWARD, JULIA STEININGER-DURWARD DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to alter ego allegations. See Sonora Diamond Corp v. Superior Court 83 Cal App 4th 523. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend causes of action 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 12. Cause of action 8 overruled as to Durward. Sustain with out leave to amend as to cause of action 10. Overruled as to causes of action 9 and 11. =(302/EHG)
